badges.name: First Spark / 初燃之星
badges.condition: Complete the first quiz / 完成第一次测验

badges.name: Three-Day Flame / 三日微焰
badges.condition: Maintain a 3-day streak / 连续学习 3 天

badges.name: Seven-Day Scholar / 七日学者
badges.condition: Maintain a 7-day streak / 连续学习 7 天

badges.name: Precision Master / 精准大师
badges.condition: Score 100% once / 获得一次满分

badges.name: Memory Sprinter / 记忆冲刺者
badges.condition: Complete 10 quizzes / 完成 10 次测验

badges.name: Text Explorer / 文本探索者
badges.condition: Practice 5 different texts / 练习 5 篇不同文本
